title: Ability to divide the My work view in boards
excerpt: My view contains all my tasks divided into dates (past, to day, this week etc.). But it’s not very clear which boards/projects the tasks are related to (unless you zoom and read details at the board coloum). I would like…

posts.author: Alberteknudsen (Alberte Knudsen)
posts.cookedHtml: My view contains all my tasks divided into dates (past, to day, this week etc.). But it’s not very clear which boards/projects the tasks are related to (unless you zoom and read details at the board coloum). I would like the option of customizing the My Work view by dividing my work tasks in to horisontal boards. Right now I don’t see that option?
